headline: PENDING — Phase-1 online C1 run not performed; dated seed committed, powered pack + live backend not run

poweredTarget.source: tools/eval_stats.required_n_for_mde(0.10) at the default conservative paired_rho=0.0
poweredTarget.note: The committed measurement_spec brackets the paired requirement up to ~785 at rho=0; grow the pack to clear whichever the spec pins before any GO. 28 is a SEED, ~7% of 393 — nowhere near powered.
poweredTarget.progress: 148/393 curated (38%). Batches v2-v5 = 120 REAL sourced dated facts (no synthesis), all passing tools/validate_dated_pack.py. Still underpowered (245 short); NOT a GO.

criticalFailures: not_run: no --online LiveFactBackend run has been performed
underpowered_seed: N=28 seed << 393; MDE@28 far exceeds the 0.10 practical threshold, so no arm delta would be a direction even if run
no_2family_judge: Phase-1 promotion needs >=2 INDEPENDENT LLM-judge families (judge != the verifier) with kappa>=0.40; not run
backend_not_asserted_live: a run must assert the backend is the real LiveFactBackend, never a mock (mock .generate() fabricates with ok=True)
note: Intentionally PENDING, following the okf-multihop precedent. The dated SEED (eval/fact_check/phase1_dated_seed_v1.jsonl) is genuinely hand-authored stable facts with sourceTimestamp/validFrom so the online run can exercise temporal_decontam + valid_time; it is temporally clean vs the 2026-07-01 cutoff (tests/test_phase1_dated_seed.py). It is NOT the powered pack and NOT a result. Promotion follows data/realtime/benchmark/measurement_spec.json: grow the pack to N>=393 with real dated live sources (do NOT synthesize to inflate N), run --online against a frozen snapshot with the LiveFactBackend (assert kind!=mock), report precision/recall/fabricationRate with 95% CIs, extend decontam to time, add >=2 independent judge families, and gate any slow-loop LoRA delta through claim_gate before merge. canClaimAGI stays false. See realtime-grounding-loop-candidate-only-2026-07-01 in agi-proof/failure-ledger.md.
